creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text: databases/php-memcached (3.0.0b1, moved from databases/php70-memcached) is a duplicate of databases/pecl-memcached (3.0.4). Since PHP flavor has been committed to the ports tree, PHP 7 users could use the packages of pecl-memcached instead of old php-memcached (which was hardcoded to php70).
